name: My boss is mad I fell off ladder and threatening my job, is that legal?
description: No, illegal retaliation; document and complain.[1]

mainEntity.name: My boss is mad I fell off ladder and threatening my job, is that legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, illegal retaliation; document and complain.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
No, retaliation for filing workers' comp is illegal in all states; protected activity.[1]

Document threats; file complaint with labor board if fired.[2]

- Keep records of communications.
- Report to HR.
- Sue for wrongful termination.

Lawyer protects rights and seeks reinstatement or damages.[3] Don't quit.
